labels.name: account_status
labels.description: Returns the calling account's plan (free or Pro), whether it's signed in, and this month's extraction usage and remaining quota. Takes no input.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: deckextract · Private data: deckextract · Public sink: deckextract.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: deckextract · Private data: deckextract · Public sink: deckextract

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
